title: ischaemum inscalptum
intro: Ischaemum inscalptum, also known as 'Broomsedge Grass', is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe and heal various health issues. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Ischaemum inscalptum can be prepared in various ways, including making teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical applications like ointments and salves.
